message:
fix(pages): scope session keys and OPFS DB files per archive URL

Prevent session and storage collisions when multiple archives are hosted
at different paths in the same browser origin.

- Add `getArchiveScopeId()` to storage.js (FNV-1a hash of the archive
  URL) and export it; replicate the same hash in crypto_worker.js for
  use inside the worker context where window is unavailable
- Replace hard-coded `SESSION_KEYS` with `getSessionKeys()` in auth.js
  so DEK/expiry/unlocked localStorage entries are scoped to the archive;
  keep `LEGACY_SESSION_KEYS` and clear them on logout for forward-compat
- Replace hard-coded `cass-archive.db` / `cass-archive.sqlite3` OPFS
  filenames with scope-id-suffixed names (e.g. `cass-archive-a1b2c3d4.db`)
  in crypto_worker.js and database.js
- Add `getArchiveOpfsDbFiles()` / `getArchiveOpfsPrimaryDbName()` helpers
  to storage.js; rename `OPFS_DB_FILES` to `LEGACY_OPFS_DB_FILES` and
  add `isCassOpfsDbFile()` regex matcher for stats/clear logic
- `clearOPFS()` gains an `allArchives` option; `clearAllStorage()` passes
  `allArchives: true` to wipe every archive's OPFS data
- Guard in wizard.rs: bail if no encryption key slots are configured
  before producing an archive (uses new `key_slot_count()` accessor)
- Add `key_slot_count()` accessor to `EncryptionEngine` in encrypt.rs
- Reformat multi-line error construction in key_management.rs (`unwrap_key`)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
